kw.msg: Request:<MultiApi> <API Name="manageItem"> <Input> <ItemList> <Item Action="Manage" ItemGroupCode="PROD" ItemID="6985646_I1" OrganizationCode="DEFAULT" UnitOfMeasure="EACH"> <PrimaryInformation ImageID="S2409733276F00_K_US_PRFMAX_SOFT_LMAT_SET.jpeg" ImageLabel="rest-renew-performance-max-soft-low-profile-mattress-set" ImageLocation="https://embed.widencdn.net/img/cityfurniture/qsxexwzyz4/640px" CostCurrency="USD" Description="Rest and Renew Performance Max Soft Low-profile Mattress Set" ExtendedDescription="Includes: Mattress and 5.5low-profile foundation Part of our exclusive Rest and Renew line, the exclusive Performance Max 14.5 mattress is designed for those seeking the most refreshing and restorative sleep experience. This foam design features a plush comfort level, making it perfect for side and back sleepers. A highly advanced, Graphene-enhanced cooling knit cover stays cool to the touch due to its superior breathability plus, offers better heat regulation and anti-bacterial properties. Enjoy lasting comfort multiple layers of Copper Gel AeroFusion memory foam, which features Phase Changing Material and bamboo charcoal to help with heat absorption that keep you feeling cool, comfortable, and fresh all night long. Convoluted flex foam, smart foam, and additional foam layers provide additional plushness and extra airflow while offering incredible support. Unbox, unroll, and unwind effortlessly with its mattress-in-a-box design. Made in the USA. Mattress protector recommended. Adjustable base compatible." IsReturnable="Y" ManufacturerItem="XavierKing Single Bed(PI)" PrimarySupplier="" ShortDescription="Rest and Renew Performance Max Soft Low-profile Mattress Set" UnitCost="2839.00" /> <InventoryParameters LeadTime="1" TimeSensitive="N" /> </Item> </ItemList> </Input> </API> </MultiApi>

A crisp finish, clean lines, and an overall relaxed look fills your dining room with seaside style. The side chair here is made from solid wood, featuring a diamond-slat back and beautifully crafted legs with subtle tapering for a nod to timeless design."
